evidence.q1: Notwithstanding Section 5 (in §7) and Section 5 exists; sections 1–15 sequential
evidence.q2: Customer Assets defined once in §2 and used consistently thereafter
evidence.q3: All time references use specific commercial phrases (e.g., 10 business days, 5 business days) with no non‑commercial phrasing like ‘a reasonable while’
evidence.q4: No archaic legal diction (e.g., no whereas, herein, or witnesseth)
evidence.q5: All sentences are grammatically complete and free of internal contradiction
evidence.q6: Consistent modern register throughout, using ‘will’ not ‘shall’, no authorial shifts
